query.text:
if dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$CheckSQLInjection(@stt_rec) = 0 return &GLTranReportSql; else begin declare @m_ma_nt0 varchar(10), @key varchar(128),@dv_tien nvarchar(16), @bilingual tinyint, @l char(1) select @m_ma_nt0 = val from options where name = N'm_ma_nt0'
declare @ma_tt nvarchar(16), @so_tt nvarchar(255), @so_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ten_bc nvarchar(255), @ten_bc2 nvarchar(255) select @ma_tt = rtrim(ltrim(val)) from options where name='r_cdkt' select @so_tt=so_tt, @so_tt2 = so_tt2, @ngay_tt = ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 = ngay_tt2 from report1 where ma_tt=@ma_tt select @ten_bc = ten_bc, @ten_bc2=ten_bc2 from report2 where ma_tt=@ma_tt and sysid='CBTran'
select rtrim(a.ong_ba) as ong_ba,rtrim(b.ten_kh) as ten_kh ,rtrim(b.ten_kh2) as ten_kh2, a.dia_chi, a.dien_giai, a.t_tt, a.t_tt_nt, a.ma_nt, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tt, @@language) as t_tt_in_word, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(a.ma_nt, a.t_tt_nt, @@language) as t_tt_nt_in_word, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tt, 'E') as t_tt_in_word2, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(a.ma_nt, a.t_tt_nt, 'E') as t_tt_nt_in_word2, a.so_ct_goc as so_ct_goc, a.dien_giai_ct_goc, a.ma_nk, a.so_ct, a.tk, a.ty_gia, replace(str(day(ngay_ct),2),' ','0') ngay, replace(str(month(ngay_ct),2),' ','0') thang, str(year(ngay_ct),4) nam, stt_rec, c.tknh, c.ten_nh as tennh, c.ten_nh2 as tennh2, c.tinh_thanh as tinhthanh, c.phone, c.fax, c.email, b.tk_nh as tk_nh, b.ngan_hang as ngan_hang, b.tinh_thanh as tinh_thanh,b.dia_chi as dia_chi from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join dmkh b with(nolock) on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh left join dmtknh c on a.tk=c.tk where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @key = 'a.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec pr_PrintCDTran @@language, @key, 'd56$$partition$current', 'r30$$partition$current', @@id
if @@form in ('110','210') begin declare @mau_in varchar(511), @q nvarchar(4000), @ma_nh varchar(30) select @ma_nh = b.ma_nh from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join dmtknh b on a.tk=b.tk where stt_rec = @stt_rec select @mau_in = mau_ht from dmmauunc where ma_nh = @ma_nh
select @mau_in = isnull(@mau_in, '') if @mau_in <> '' begin set @q = 'select ' set @q = @q + case when @mau_in <> '' then '''' + replace(replace(@mau_in, ' ', ''), '''', '') + ''' as reportFile' else '' end exec sp_executesql @q end
end
end
